title: kepa esculenta
intro: Kepa esculenta, also known as Ipomoea pes-caprae or sea morning glory, is a type of flowering, vining plant that thrives in tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Kepa esculenta include its potential to help manage diabetes, lower blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Kepa esculenta can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
